title: Summary: Turn 786
content: The project at `D:\workspace\KnowledgeBase\knowledgeBase` is a lightweight Java knowledge base engine (`knowledge-base`) that extracts core concepts (Notions) from multimedia materials (images, video, audio, documents) via an OpenAI-compatible API, builds a structured knowledge graph, and visualizes it through a CLI or a React/Cytoscape.js-based Web UI. It uses Java 8, Maven, H2 database, and FFmpeg, with a four-step pipeline: gather, build, infer relations, and visualise.
